title: abies excelsa var. mucronata
intro: Abies excelsa var. mucronata, commonly known as Himalayan fir or Daphne or Kashmir silver fir, is a variant of the Abies excelsa species, a coniferous tree native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils and terpenes. The health benefits of Abies excelsa var. mucronata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the resinous extracts of this plant are often used to make essential oils, which are used in aromatherapy and other applications.
